main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'daño oxidativo irreversible por cloramina + lechos CAG agotados + aumento no notificado' literal.

alternatives.justification: 4 alts (cloro libre por descomposición, bromaminas, envejecimiento, fouling/channeling).

recommended_action.justification: SBS 38% + 3.0 mg/L + ORP setpoint +50 mV + alarma — match gold.

requested_data.justification: Pide autopsia ATR-FTIR + test tinción — match accepted.

decision_change_condition.justification: Multi: ATR-FTIR poliamida intacta + defectos MECH → switch.
